payload.prompt_override: Create a COMPREHENSIVE SEO strategy document for AgenticMarketingPro. Include: 1) Technical SEO audit checklist (Core Web Vitals, schema markup types, site architecture, crawlability), 2) Keyword universe with 6 topic clusters and pillar pages, 3) Programmatic SEO plan (agent x use-case pages, competitor comparison pages, city-based pages), 4) Schema markup implementation plan (Organization, SoftwareApplication, FAQPage, HowTo, Article, BreadcrumbList, Review), 5) URL structure recommendations, 6) Content velocity plan. Context: AgenticMarketingPro is an AI-powered marketing OS. Target: DR 50 by month 12, 15 new DR 50+ links/month.
